spec.precondition: requires valid(alloc) && valid(alloc->chunks) && alloc->n_chunks >= 0 && alloc->n_chunks <= GGML_VBUFFER_MAX_CHUNKS && forall i in 0..GGML_VBUFFER_MAX_CHUNKS: (alloc->chunks[i] == NULL || valid(alloc->chunks[i]))
spec.postcondition: (ensures valid(alloc) && alloc->n_chunks == 0 && forall i in 0..GGML_VBUFFER_MAX_CHUNKS: alloc->chunks[i] == NULL && (alloc is reset to initial state, ready for fresh allocation tracking with all previous allocation records cleared)) && (alloc->n_chunks == 0 && forall i in 0..GGML_VBUFFER_MAX_CHUNKS: alloc->chunks[i] == NULL)
